unconditional_target_desc: Absolute target: 1.49 GtCO2e by 2030 (peak), declining to 1.49 GtCO2e by 2035 (baseline 2019).
conditional_target_desc: 1.35 GtCO2e by 2030 / 1.26 GtCO2e by 2035 with international support; 8–17.5% lower than previous Enhanced NDC.
targets: 31.89% unconditional / 43.20% conditional vs 2010 BAU (legacy reference); economy-wide absolute target 2019-baseline (SNDC)
